recommendations.title: Mozart and the Whale
recommendations.overview: A love story between two savants with Asperger's syndrome, a kind of autism, whose conditions sabotage their budding relationship.

recommendations.title: Bell, Book and Candle
recommendations.overview: Gillian Holroyd, a modern-day witch, becomes smitten with her handsome upstairs neighbor, Shep Henderson. Using her magical powers, she casts a love spell on him, only to face unexpected complications when genuine feelings emerge, threatening her sup

recommendations.title: Darling Companion
recommendations.overview: Beth develops a deep bond with a dog she rescues. But when her self-absorbed husband loses the dog, the search takes some unexpected turns.

recommendations.title: All of Us Strangers
recommendations.overview: One night in his near-empty tower block in contemporary London, Adam has a chance encounter with a mysterious neighbor Harry, which punctures the rhythm of his everyday life.

recommendations.title: The Road Within
recommendations.overview: A young man with Tourette's Syndrome embarks on a road trip with his recently-deceased mother's ashes.

recommendations.title: Front of the Class
recommendations.overview: A boy with Tourette's syndrome overcomes criticism and discrimination to achieve his dream of becoming a teacher.

recommendations.title: Her
recommendations.overview: In the not so distant future, Theodore, a lonely writer, purchases a newly developed operating system designed to meet the user's every need. To Theodore's surprise, a romantic relationship develops between him and his operating system. This unconven

recommendations.title: Mr. Morgan's Last Love
recommendations.overview: A widowed professor living in Paris develops a special relationship with a younger French woman.

recommendations.title: Albatross
recommendations.overview: Beth, a bookish teenager, befriends Emilia, an aspiring novelist who has just arrived in town. Emilia soon begins an affair with Beth's father that threatens to have devastating consequences.

recommendations.title: Rab Ne Bana Di Jodi
recommendations.overview: A lonely 40-ish man, likely to remain a bachelor, has a chance to find the love of his life when he falls for a vivacious young woman.
